title: Feasibility and acceptability of oral cholera vaccine mass vaccination campaign in response to an outbreak and floods in Malawi.
summary: Documentation of the first mass oral cholera vaccine (OCV) campaign in Malawi (2015) in response to a cholera outbreak and floods in Nsanje district.
key_findings: Feasible and acceptable for large-scale OCV campaigns in Malawi
population: People in Nsanje district, Malawi (including children under 15)
